title: Self-Attention & Multi-Head Attention mechanics
description: Analyze the mechanics of self-attention and multi-head attention within transformer models. Explain how QKT dot-product scaling contributes to the quadratic complexity of context windows. Describe the emergence of 'In-context Learning' as a property of transformer architectures.
objectives: Analyze the mechanics of self-attention and multi-head attention within transformer models.
Explain how QKT dot-product scaling contributes to the quadratic complexity of context windows.
Describe the emergence of 'In-context Learning' as a property of transformer architectures.
